details: All expected local Tmrt rasters must open for content QA.
All rasters must have the same CRS before pixelwise deltas.
All rasters must have the same shape before pixelwise deltas.
All rasters must have the same transform before pixelwise deltas.
All rasters must have the same nodata before pixelwise deltas.
All rasters must have the same dtype before pixelwise deltas.
Pixel count should be identical for all 20 rasters.
Expected output paths must remain local-only and outside Git.
QA writes only compact CSV/Markdown artifacts.
